identity.name: Falcon Web Studio
identity.mission: Minimalist digital agency crafting high-performance websites.

layout_strategy.grid_system: Use CSS Grid for bento-style layouts (12 columns on desktop).
layout_strategy.alignment: Left-aligned typography for readability, centered containers for structural balance.

hero.structure: Split layout or centered text with floating geometric falcon elements.
elements: Headline: 'Websites That Turn Visitors Into Customers'
Subheadline: 'Precision-engineered digital experiences for modern brands.'
Visual: Animated geometric shapes (triangles/polygons) forming an abstract falcon wing or eye.

items.title: Website Design
items.desc: Custom UI/UX design tailored to your brand identity.

items.title: Website Redesign
items.desc: Modernizing legacy sites for better performance and aesthetics.

items.title: Conversion Optimization
items.desc: Data-driven strategies to turn traffic into revenue.

portfolio.interaction: Image scale on hover + Overlay with Client Name and Role.

process.layout: Horizontal step timeline with connecting lines.

cta.style: Full-width dark section or gradient electric blue.

footer.style: Simple multi-column with logo and links.

assets.icons: Lucide React (Layout, RefreshCw, TrendingUp, Zap, Smartphone, Search, BarChart, ChevronRight, Menu, X, ArrowRight)

universal_rules: Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install framer-motion: `yarn add framer-motion` (CRITICAL for smooth animations).
Create a `Layout` component that wraps the page with smooth scroll behavior if possible, or just standard structure.
Implement the 'Geometric Falcon' as a CSS/SVG composition in the Hero background.
Ensure the WhatsApp link uses the format `https://wa.me/`.
Prioritize the 'Electric Blue' (#3B82F6) for primary actions and accents only. Don't overuse it.
